validators.name: agent-review
validators.rubric: Review the produced regression tests for exact task fidelity, correctness, and scope control. Pass only if the tests directly cover the retry/no-op recovery behavior and stay limited to the requested test file.

nodes.description: Create only project/tests/Plugin.Actors.Tests/AgentRuntimeActorTests.cs with focused regression tests for the retry/no-op recovery behavior already implemented on this branch. Cover at least these cases: no_op with artifacts from the current task worktree is accepted as completion; no_op without artifacts still fails when AllowNoOpCompletion is false. Do not edit any production file.
